## Entities.Inventory.IMoldInventoryEntry interface

Inventory entry for molds.

The moldId is the full composite ID (e.g., 'builtin.silicone-round') identifying which specific mold from which collection is being inventoried.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IMoldInventoryEntry extends IInventoryEntryBase 
```
**Extends:** [IInventoryEntryBase](./ts-chocolate.entities.inventory.iinventoryentrybase.md)
